session_summary: This session executed the non-nested (Vuong-regime) CS-vs-AR(1) measurement of the O(1) (A)+(C) differential (Proposition L4), the paper's only derived-but-never-measured claim, plus a follow-on dissimilar-pair run, and ended by rendering the manuscript and derivation to Google Drive. Marcus's role was to set the agenda via a detailed prereg-before-code handoff, supply compute-budget constraints, ratify the AI's proposed mid-run amendments, repeatedly demand an honest resolved/unresolved accounting, and approve the dissimilar-pair extension. He steered scope and epistemic standards while the AI did the derivation, runs, and drafting.

coded_turns.quote:
PREREGISTER todo/029 ... and
     **COMMIT IT BEFORE ANY SCRIPT CODE EXISTS** (the todo/027 provenance lesson).
coded_turns.note: Kickoff handoff: assigns the non-nested measurement, enforces prereg-before-code discipline, locks theorem/scope, defines guardrails.
coded_turns.artifact_hint: todo/028 + todo/029 prereg, non-nested CS-vs-AR(1) measurement

coded_turns.quote: It's fine, but I can only give you 4 cores. I'm okay with the run taking a while
coded_turns.note: Signs off on the AI's proposed prereg amendment and supplies a compute-budget constraint before freezing R.

coded_turns.quote: It's fine, but I can only give you 8 cores. I'm okay with the run taking a while
coded_turns.note: Revises the core grant up to 8 while re-affirming sign-off on the amendment.

coded_turns.quote: Background command "Graded R=20000 sweep, 8 cores, all cells" completed (exit code 0)
coded_turns.note: System task-notification, not a human move; the R=20000 sweep finished.

coded_turns.quote: So what is the upshot. What is known and not known from these results? What is resolved and not resolved?
coded_turns.note: Demands an honest epistemic accounting of the run, forcing a resolved-vs-unresolved split rather than a result claim.
coded_turns.artifact_hint: todo/029 grading; resolved/unresolved framing of L4 differential

coded_turns.quote: So is this something that can be left to future research?
coded_turns.note: Probes whether the unresolved dissimilar-pair magnitude can be deferred to the sequel, testing scope boundary.
coded_turns.artifact_hint: scope D-06 sequel deferral; todo/023 pairwise-matrix testbed

coded_turns.quote: Agree a dissimilar pair makes sense
coded_turns.note: Approves the AI's proposal to add one dissimilar pair before submission as a positive empirical anchor.

coded_turns.quote: Background command "Full dissimilar-pair run R=20000, cells A/A'" completed (exit code 0)
coded_turns.note: System task-notification, not a human move; the dissimilar-pair run finished.
Approves proceeding to land the dissimilar-pair result and continue the closeout/drafting.

coded_turns.quote: Can you render the manuscript as a pdf and put a copy at the root of my Google Drive
coded_turns.note: Operational instruction to render the submission manuscript to PDF and place it on Google Drive.

coded_turns.quote: Render the derivation as html and put a copy on Google Drive
coded_turns.note: Operational instruction to render the technical derivation companion to HTML on Google Drive.

ai_side.evidence: the *content* of my amendment departs from the handoff's example, so I want your sign-off before I freeze R and commit ~1–2h of compute.
ai_side.note: Assistant explicitly put the prereg-amendment decision to Marcus rather than silently amending and running.

ai_side.evidence: the literal fallback ("strengthen the imbalance") is the wrong remedy — the signal is already large; the 0.25 MDE was just set too stringently
ai_side.note: Assistant flagged that the handoff's prescribed fallback remedy was mismatched to the observed noise scale.

ai_side.evidence: Want me to do the one dissimilar pair (it's a small extension to the existing run), or leave it for the sequel and move to the §3–§6 drafting?
ai_side.note: Assistant laid out add-dissimilar-pair vs defer-to-sequel with trade-offs for Marcus to choose.

ai_side.evidence: **unresolved** — how much it actually distorts model comparison when the candidates are genuinely different, which is where it would matter most.
ai_side.note: Assistant volunteered the unresolved gap (dissimilar-pair distortion) where the term would matter most.

ai_side.evidence: Want me to take that on, or is this a good stopping point?
ai_side.note: Assistant surfaced the stop-vs-continue (§3–§6 drafting) decision at a clean boundary.

ai_side.evidence: its PDF would need a bit of format massaging to come out clean, whereas this one rendered out of the box.
ai_side.note: Assistant flagged that derivation.qmd's raw-HTML margins and inline code complicate a clean PDF render.
